titleStmt.title: SII 9.618: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 618. (A.R. No. 63 of 1904.) ON THE SOUTH WALL OF THE RUINED TEMPLE AT HALUGODE NEAR KURUGODU, BELLARY TALUK, SAME DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated Śaka 1467, Viśvāvasu, Pushya, ba. 10, Sōmavāra corresponding to A.D. 1545 December 28, Monday, in the reign of Sadāśivarāya-Mahārāya. It records that Rāmarājaya, elder brother of Aḷiya Liṅgarājadēva, and the grandson of the Mahāmaṇḍalēsvara Koṭagāra Rāmarāja-Voḍeya, made a grant of land for the service of the god Jinnadēva in the basti at Kuṟigōḍu. The gift was made for the merit of his father Mallarāja-Voḍeya, with the consent of the Gauḍa, Sēnabōva and the Paṭṭaṇasvāmis. It also records that in Phālguṇa śu. 8, Sōmavara of the same year corresponding to A.D. 1546, February 8, Monday, Gōmiseṭṭi son of Sūriyappaseṭṭi of the Mūla-saṅgha and Balātkāra-gaṇa repaired, along with Padmarasa-Paṇḍiṭa, the same temple.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . svasti śrījayādyudayaśālivāhanaśakavaruṣa 1463 neya viśvāvasusaṁvatsarada puṣya ba 10 sō lu śrīma(ṁ)nmahādēvadēvōttama
kuṟigōḍa bastiya jiṁnadēvarige dharmamahārājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrīvīrāpratāpa śrīvīrasadāśivarāyamahārāyaru pṛthvīrājyaṁ
geyuta yiralu śrīma(ṁ)nmahāmaṇḍalēśvara koṭagāra rāmarājavoḍeyara moṁmakkaḷu Aḷiya liṁgarājayadēva mahāarasuga
ḷa Aṁṇaṁdiru rāmarājayagaḷu taṁma taṁde mallarājavoḍeyarige pu(ṁ)ṇyavāgabēku yeṁdu dēvara Amrutapaḍinaivēdyakke
koṭa hola keḷahuṇasēmarada staḷadalu maṁgajīyanavara hōbaḷi paṭṭavaḷiyavaru mā ḍuva Ereyastaḷaṁ va 1 Idara
holavanu hoṁdida maṁgajīya nīrastaḷada bitta bījava 2 Ubhayaṁ hola bīja va 3 tōṭa Ūrige mūḍalu Uppina
mōḷeya hoṁdida koravara kanakana tōṭada sta 1 kke bījava 1 Aṁtu staḷa 3 ke bījava 4 Akṣāradalu nāguḷuda bījavari
yanu jiṁnadēvara Amrutapaḍige kuṟugōḍagauḍa sēnabōva paṭaṇasvāmigaḷa Anumatadiṁda koṭeU Āgi Ācaṁ
drarkastayavāgi dēvara Amrutapaḍi nayivēdyake Anubhavisabahudu yi dha(ṁ)rmakke Ārūbaru tapidarū ta(ṁ)mma taṁde tāyi kāśiyyali koṁda pāta
kakke hōharu gōbrā(ṁ)hmara koṁda pātakakke hōharu Eṁdu koṭa dharmmada śilāśāsana sarvamānya . śrīmūlasaṁgha balātkaragaṇada kaṁmevaisya
kulōttama sūriyappaseṭṭiyara maga gōmiseṭi tatsaṁvatsarada pālguṇa śudha 2 sō lu jīrṇōddhāraṇeya māḍisi samasta srāvakarige pu(ṁ)ṇyavāgabēkeṁ
du māḍisida jinaśāsana śrī śrī śrī
padmarasapaṁḍitara Anukūlavāgi māḍisadanu śrī .
Digital edition of SII 9.618 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
